docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,497.00 FILED BY GLOVER, JESSICA G AS TO DEFENDANT MCCORMICK, TIMOTHY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
